current_focus.reason: BA-10-S4 now has working `lead_handoff -> agent_review -> people_search -> email_discovery -> sending -> delivery_feedback` supervisor progression for sent terminal waves plus review-worthy no-send sending outcomes, while the matrix still sits at 191 implemented / 7 partial / 14 gap scenarios; the next highest-value slice remains a build-lead implementation pass on downstream supervisor action-catalog steps beyond `sending`, because that same cluster still blocks autonomous delivery-feedback handling and contact-rooted general-learning selection.

commands.title: Supervisor downstream hardening regressions
commands.description: Confirms `lead_handoff` advances into `agent_review`, bounded mandatory review advances into `people_search`, bounded people search advances into `email_discovery`, bounded email discovery advances into `sending`, bounded sending advances into `delivery_feedback` or a review-worthy no-send terminal outcome, the remaining `delivery_feedback` blocker still escalates explicitly, and retries preserve the same durable run plus pending review packet.

commands.title: Acceptance report guards
commands.description: Keeps the committed BA-10 acceptance and blocker reports synchronized with repo code, tests, and state references.
